title: aegilops geniculata subsp. gibberosa
intro: Aegilops geniculata subsp. gibberosa, also known as Persian goatgrass, is a species of wild grass that belongs to the wheat family (Poaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Aegilops geniculata subsp. gibberosa include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health issues.
